content: I'm as Berber as you are.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Amastan (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ber:Anect ay tellam kenwi d Imaziɣen ay lliɣ ula d nekk
ber:Anect ay tellamt kennemti d Timaziɣin ay lliɣ ula d nekk
ber:Anect ay tellid kemm d Tamaziɣt ay lliɣ ula d nekk
